Recall Status Reports Recall Status Reports   Should contain the following information: Should contain the following information: • • The number of consignees that were The number of consignees that were notified of the recall, along with the notified of the recall, along with the date and method of notification. date and method of notification. • • The number of consignees that The number of consignees that responded to the recall communication responded to the recall communication and quantity of products on hand at the and quantity of products on hand at the time it was received. time it was received. • • The number of consignees that were The number of consignees that were unresponsive. unresponsive. Recall Status Reports Recall Status Reports • • The number of products returned or corrected The number of products returned or corrected by each consignee contacted and the quantity by each consignee contacted and the quantity of products accounted for. of products accounted for. • • The number and results of effectiveness The number and results of effectiveness checks that were conducted. checks that were conducted. • • The estimated time frames for completion of The estimated time frames for completion of the recall. the recall.   Recall status reports are to be Recall status reports are to be discontinued when the recall is terminated discontinued when the recall is terminated by the FDA. by the FDA.
